---
name: Feature request
about: suggest a feature for engram
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What pain does this address? Describe the friction, missing capability, or workflow gap you're hitting today. Concrete examples beat abstract wishes.

## Proposed solution

Describe the concrete change you'd like to see. Include the shape of the API, file layout, or behavior — enough that a maintainer could scope it without a follow-up round of questions.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Workarounds you tried, other tools that solve this differently, or shapes of the solution you rejected and why.

## Scope check

Is this within engram's mission — a **memory pattern for Claude Code**, not a general-purpose agent framework? Explain how the request fits that scope. Requests that would turn engram into a broader framework, orchestrator, or model-agnostic library are likely out of scope and better suited to a fork or a sibling project.

## Attribution

If this idea is adapted from another repo, blog post, or prior art, cite it here (link + author). We take attribution seriously and would rather credit upstream than reinvent silently.

## Additional context

Anything else — screenshots, transcripts, links to related issues, eval data, or the story of how you ran into this. Optional but usually helpful.
